locations.name: Food Bank of Northern Indiana
locations.notes: Regional distribution partner. Donor drop-offs should call ahead.

locations.name: Cultivate Food Rescue
locations.hours: Warehouse and volunteer shifts vary; check site or call before visiting
locations.notes: Rescues surplus food across northern Indiana and distributes meals and staples to schools, pantries, and shelters.

locations.name: Broadway Christian Parish Pantry
locations.hours: Pantry schedule varies; verify by phone/website

locations.name: St. Vincent de Paul (South Bend)
locations.hours: Service windows vary by program; verify before visiting
locations.notes: Includes food assistance and other family support services.

locations.name: Center for the Homeless Meal Services
locations.address: 813 S Michigan St, South Bend, IN 46601
locations.hours: Meal service daily; exact times should be verified

locations.name: Hope Ministries Food Program
locations.address: 432 S Lafayette Blvd, South Bend, IN 46601
locations.hours: Meal schedule can change; verify before arrival
locations.notes: Serves guests through rescue ministry meal program.

locations.name: Unity Gardens Produce Redistribution
locations.notes: Redistributes fresh produce through community gardens.
